listOfQuestions.question: Which Organic Chemistry concept is described by this clue: A hydrocarbon with at least one carbon-carbon double bond?
Which Organic Chemistry concept is described by this clue: A hydrocarbon with at least one carbon-carbon triple bond?
Which Organic Chemistry concept is described by this clue: An organic compound containing a hydroxyl group?
Which Organic Chemistry concept is described by this clue: An organic compound containing a carboxyl group?
Which Organic Chemistry concept is described by this clue: An organic compound often formed from an alcohol and a carboxylic acid?
Which Organic Chemistry concept is described by this clue: An organic compound containing nitrogen bonded to carbon or hydrogen?
Which Organic Chemistry concept is described by this clue: A large molecule made from repeating smaller units?
Which Organic Chemistry concept is described by this clue: A small molecule that can join to form a polymer?
Which Organic Chemistry concept is described by this clue: A compound with the same formula but a different structure?
Which Organic Chemistry concept is described by this clue: A group of atoms that gives a molecule characteristic reactions?
Which Organic Chemistry concept is described by this clue: A compound with no carbon-carbon multiple bonds?
Which Organic Chemistry concept is described by this clue: A compound with at least one carbon-carbon multiple bond?
Which Organic Chemistry concept is described by this clue: A stable ring compound with delocalized electrons?
Which Organic Chemistry concept is described by this clue: A substance that speeds a reaction without being consumed?
Which Organic Chemistry concept is described by this clue: A reaction where atoms add across a multiple bond?
Which Organic Chemistry concept is described by this clue: A reaction where one atom or group replaces another?
Which Organic Chemistry concept is described by this clue: A reaction that joins molecules while releasing a small molecule?
Which Organic Chemistry concept is described by this clue: Breaking larger hydrocarbons into smaller molecules?
Which Organic Chemistry concept is described by this clue: A compound made only of carbon and hydrogen?
Which Organic Chemistry concept is described by this clue: A hydrocarbon with only single carbon-carbon bonds?
